title: Automate Notifications When Form is Filled
excerpt:

posts.author: cris.dellinger (Cris Dellinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’d really like to create an automation for a WorkForm in this format:
When a form is submitted, notify all teammates via x.

Frustrating that on the WorkForm, this example is given but cannot be replicated exactly.
I understand the language used in this clip is different from the automation builder.
It would be helpful if this page linked to a tutorial about how to set up this automation.

posts.cookedHtml: EXACT SAME ISSUE. Let me know if you figure this one out.

posts.author: lmizike33 (Mike K)
posts.cookedHtml: I see it … you have to select Integrations not Automations. And then it appears you also need to setup a Typeform account :-\ Not intuitive
